## Summary

A clear and concise description of the proposed feature or improvement.

## Motivation

Why is this feature important? Please describe the use case or problem it would address.

## Proposed Solution

How do you suggest implementing this feature? (optional)

## Alternatives

Have you considered any alternative approaches?

## Additional Information

Any other context, mockups, or references relevant to the feature request.
